h1: AI reply generator for difficult client conversations
metaTitle: AI Reply Generator for Difficult Client Conversations | Flowdockr
metaDescription: Generate clearer replies for pricing objections, scope pressure, payment delays, and awkward client conversations. Flowdockr helps you respond with more strategy and less guesswork.
heroSubheading: Draft professional replies for difficult client conversations without starting from scratch.
primaryIntent: Provide a broad reply-generation tool that can handle multiple client communication situations, especially pricing-related ones.
intro: Flowdockr helps you turn messy client messages into clearer next-step replies. Instead of guessing what to say, you can work from the actual context, your goal, and the tone you want to keep.

inputs.name: clientMessage
inputs.label: Client message
inputs.placeholder: Paste the exact client message here

inputs.name: projectContext
inputs.label: Project context
inputs.placeholder: Add quote, scope, timeline, or budget context

inputs.name: goal
inputs.label: Your goal
inputs.placeholder: Protect price, clarify scope, keep deal alive, etc.

exampleUseCases: More work for the same price
notes: General-purpose tool page. Must feel like a real software tool page, not a thin CTA wrapper.

metaDescription: Generate better price negotiation emails for quote pushback, discount requests, low-budget clients, and competitor comparisons. Flowdockr helps you protect your rate with clearer positioning.
heroSubheading: Write pricing replies that protect your rate, clarify trade-offs, and move the deal forward.
primaryIntent: Provide a pricing-specific tool page for drafting negotiation emails and replies tied to price objections, discounts, and budget pressure.
supportKeywords: how to reply to discount request
intro: This tool is built for pricing conversations specifically. Whether the quote feels high, the client wants a discount, the budget is lower than expected, or a cheaper option is being used as leverage, Flowdockr helps you write a response that protects your position.

inputs.name: scenario
inputs.label: Pricing scenario
inputs.placeholder: Quote too high, direct discount, low budget, competitor comparison, etc.

inputs.name: clientMessage
inputs.label: Client pricing message
inputs.placeholder: Paste the exact pricing objection or request

inputs.name: quoteAmount
inputs.label: Current quote or rate
inputs.placeholder: Add your current quote, package, or pricing context

inputs.name: goal
inputs.label: Your goal
inputs.placeholder: Hold price, test budget, reduce scope, close the deal, etc.

notes: Pricing-specific tool page and the main conversion destination for pricing scenario pages.
